name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke
description: E5 Phase 7b/3 — compute marcher smoke. Flips computeMarchEnabled, waits ≥10 dispatches, validates the readback is non-empty + non-uniform, restores toggle. Fails the test if the compute pipeline dispatches < 10× in 10s, the readback is null/empty, or the output is blank. Single front-view checkpoint locks the canvas (compute toggle is OFF at capture time so this also verifies fragment path is unperturbed).
